# ggsegYan

Yan 2023 Homotopic Cortical Parcellation Atlases for the ggsegverse
Ecosystem.

## Installation

``` r
# From r-universe
install.packages("ggsegYan", repos = "https://ggsegverse.r-universe.dev")

# From GitHub
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("ggsegverse/ggsegYan")
```

## Atlases

Homotopic cortical parcellations at 100–1000 parcels with Yeo 7-network
and 17-network labels (Yan et al., 2023).

### Available variants

| Parcels | 7 Networks                                                                    | 17 Networks                                                                     |
|--------:|:------------------------------------------------------------------------------|:--------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|     100 | [`yan7_100()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan7_100.md)   | [`yan17_100()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan17_100.md)   |
|     200 | [`yan7_200()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan7_200.md)   | [`yan17_200()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan17_200.md)   |
|     300 | [`yan7_300()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan7_300.md)   | [`yan17_300()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan17_300.md)   |
|     400 | [`yan7_400()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan7_400.md)   | [`yan17_400()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan17_400.md)   |
|     500 | [`yan7_500()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan7_500.md)   | [`yan17_500()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan17_500.md)   |
|     600 | [`yan7_600()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan7_600.md)   | [`yan17_600()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan17_600.md)   |
|     700 | [`yan7_700()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan7_700.md)   | [`yan17_700()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan17_700.md)   |
|     800 | [`yan7_800()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan7_800.md)   | [`yan17_800()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan17_800.md)   |
|     900 | [`yan7_900()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan7_900.md)   | [`yan17_900()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan17_900.md)   |
|    1000 | [`yan7_1000()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan7_1000.md) | [`yan17_1000()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan17_1000.md) |

### yan7_100

``` r
library(ggsegYan)
plot(yan7_100())
```

![](reference/figures/README-yan7_100-1.png)

### yan7_1000

``` r
plot(yan7_1000())
```

![](reference/figures/README-yan7_1000-1.png)

### yan17_100

``` r
plot(yan17_100())
```

![](reference/figures/README-yan17_100-1.png)

### yan17_1000

``` r
plot(yan17_1000())
```

![](reference/figures/README-yan17_1000-1.png) \## Data source

[ThomasYeoLab/CBIG](https://github.com/ThomasYeoLab/CBIG/tree/master/stable_projects/brain_parcellation/Yan2023_homotopic/parcellations/FreeSurfer/fsaverage5/label)
(fsaverage5).

- **Reference**: Yan et al. (2023)
  [doi:10.1016/j.neuroimage.2023.120010](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.neuroimage.2023.120010)
- **Date obtained**: 2026-03-28

# Package index

## Atlases

- [`yan17_100()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan17_100.md)
  : Yan 17-Network 100-Parcel Atlas
- [`yan17_1000()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan17_1000.md)
  : Yan 17-Network 1000-Parcel Atlas
- [`yan17_200()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan17_200.md)
  : Yan 17-Network 200-Parcel Atlas
- [`yan17_300()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan17_300.md)
  : Yan 17-Network 300-Parcel Atlas
- [`yan17_400()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan17_400.md)
  : Yan 17-Network 400-Parcel Atlas
- [`yan17_500()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan17_500.md)
  : Yan 17-Network 500-Parcel Atlas
- [`yan17_600()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan17_600.md)
  : Yan 17-Network 600-Parcel Atlas
- [`yan17_700()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan17_700.md)
  : Yan 17-Network 700-Parcel Atlas
- [`yan17_800()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan17_800.md)
  : Yan 17-Network 800-Parcel Atlas

  : Yan 17-Network 900-Parcel Atlas

  : Yan 7-Network 100-Parcel Atlas

  : Yan 7-Network 1000-Parcel Atlas

  : Yan 7-Network 200-Parcel Atlas

  : Yan 7-Network 300-Parcel Atlas
- [`yan7_400()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan7_400.md)
  : Yan 7-Network 400-Parcel Atlas
- [`yan7_500()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan7_500.md)
  : Yan 7-Network 500-Parcel Atlas

  : Yan 7-Network 600-Parcel Atlas

  : Yan 7-Network 700-Parcel Atlas
- [`yan7_800()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan7_800.md)
  : Yan 7-Network 800-Parcel Atlas
- [`yan7_900()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegYan/reference/yan7_900.md)
  : Yan 7-Network 900-Parcel Atlas
